dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires detecting price/momentum divergence and reversal into phase alignment. Translated using MACD (momentum proxy) and price direction. Entry requires 5+ bars of price reversal and momentum confirmation (represented by MACD crossover with positive histogram magnitude). Exit triggers on coherence loss (divergence resumption). Stop loss anchored at swing point approximated as 2% from entry. Confirmation_bars parameter (5) embedded in entry logic requiring both series alignment. Coherence_threshold_percent (60%) reflected in momentum magnitude requirement via MACD histogram threshold.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires detecting price/momentum divergence and reversal into phase alignment. Translated using MACD (momentum proxy) and price direction. Entry requires 5+ bars of price reversal and momentum confirmation (represented by MACD crossover with positive histogram magnitude). Exit triggers on coherence loss (divergence resumption). Stop loss anchored at swing point approximated as 2% from entry. Confirmation_bars parameter (5) embedded in entry logic requiring both series alignment. Coherence_threshold_percent (60%) reflected in momentum magnitude requirement via MACD histogram threshold.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate a reversal trade only when both price and momentum have convincingly reversed direction and moved back into coherence (phase alignment), not when divergence first appears.
